title: Chandrila Defense Fleet
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Otheruses|Chandrila|more=Defense Fleet}} {{Fleet |image= |name=Chandrila Defense Fleet |type=[[Navy/Legends|Defense Fleet]]''[[The Last Command Sourcebook]]''''[[Strongholds of Resistance]]'' |founder= |founded= |fragmented= |reorganized= |dissolved= |restored= |headquarter= |location=[[Chandrila/Legends|Chandrila]] |commander=*[[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Hiram Drayson/Legends|Hiram Drayson]]''[[Dark Force Rising Sourcebook]]'' *Admiral [[Kohl Seerdon]]{{InsiderCite|71|Republic HoloNet News Core Edition 14:10:03}} |officers= |crew=[[Kylan DuPre]] |flagship= |capital=''[[Stormstrike]]'' |starfighters= |ground= |naval= |campaigns= |battles= |affiliation=*[[Chandrilan Security Force]] *[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] }} {{Quote|You never have gotten over this notion that smuggling is an honorable line of work, have you? What makes you think I would have taken your dirty money?''"
"''Because I knew what kind of chit the Admiral of Chandrila Defense Fleet was drawing. Every good smuggler knows that bribes will get him places bravado won't.''"
"''You know, Baron, I really hate the fact that I can't help but like you.''"
"''I know. I have the same problem. I never thought I could be friends with someone who was so fond of ''rules''.|Hiram Drayson and [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]]|''[[Before the Storm]]''}} The '''Chandrila Defense Fleet''' was the [[Navy/Legends|Defense Fleet]] of the planet [[Chandrila/Legends|Chandrila]]. {{Military-stub}} ==History== [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Hiram Drayson/Legends|Hiram Drayson]] led the [[Fleet/Legends|Fleet]] for many years during the last decades of the Republic, until he was replaced by [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] military council with [[Kohl Seerdon]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. It was requisitioned by the emerging [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and merged into the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] under his command. After the fall of the Empire, Drayson was reassigned to lead the Fleet again. ==Appearances== *{{InsiderCite|71|Republic HoloNet News Core Edition 14:10:03}} {{Mo}} *[[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']] {{Mo}} *''[[Before the Storm]]'' {{Mo}} ==Sources== *''[[Dark Force Rising Sourcebook]]'' {{1stm}} *''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe, Second Edition, Revised and Expanded]]'' *''[[The Thrawn Trilogy Sourcebook]]'' *[[Star Wars: Rebellion: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars: Rebellion'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]] *''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe, Third Edition, Revised and Expanded]]'' *''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]'' *''[[The Force Unleashed Campaign Guide]]'' *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *[[Star Wars: Age of Rebellion Core Rulebook|''Star Wars: Age of Rebellion'' Core Rulebook]] *''[[Strongholds of Resistance]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |es=Flota de Defensa de Chandrila }} [[Category:Galactic Republic fleets]] [[Category:Imperial fleets]] [[Category:Organizations of Chandrila]] [[Category:Planetary defense fleets]]
